name: Topgolf Lake Mary
about: Topgolf Lake Mary is a premier entertainment destination in Lake Mary, FL, offering a high-tech golfing experience with all-weather bays. The venue features HDTVs in every bay and a sports bar and restaurant, providing a comfortable setting for year-round play. Using complimentary clubs or personal ones, players aim at giant outfield targets with high-tech balls that automatically score. The facility is designed for groups, with bays accommodating up to six players, and offers various pricing tiers and promotions to suit different budgets and schedules. Its atmosphere combines a modern sports bar with interactive gaming, making it suitable for both casual entertainment and focused practice.
why_golfers_like_it: All-weather bays with climate control for year-round comfort
High-tech balls that automatically score for instant feedback
HDTVs in every bay and a large video wall for sports viewing
Complimentary club rentals available for convenience
Multiple pricing options including promotions and memberships

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar and restaurant with a sports bar and restaurant menu available

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary clubs are provided, but you can also use your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not allowed. The venue has a full bar and restaurant on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Pricing is per hour, per bay, and the time to play depends on your group's pace and the number of games you choose.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, anyone under 16 must be supervised by a guest 21+, and the venue offers family-friendly events and a welcoming atmosphere.
